tagline: June 30, 2026 Lakehouse Real Time (Lakehouse//RT) is now in [Beta](/aws/en/release notes/release types).
what_it_does: June 30, 2026 Lakehouse Real Time (Lakehouse//RT) is now in [Beta](/aws/en/release notes/release types). Lakehouse//RT is a serverless SQL warehouse type built for low latency, high concurrency workloads, delivering sub second SQL read queries against Unity Catalog tables.
why_it_matters: Lakehouse//RT is a serverless SQL warehouse type built for low latency, high concurrency workloads, delivering sub second SQL read queries against Unity Catalog tables.
